agent_stats.outcome_reasoning: The document is an Article 4(1) Direction for an area in Bristol. Page 3 contains a clear map with a red boundary covering parts of Redland, Bishopston, and St Andrews. I used the central location of Cranbrook Road for the match. The match_at call returned a very strong result with 904 inliers and 91% road name agreement, confirming the location. The scale consistency was acceptable for a wide-area map. I have committed this match and am submitting the result.
